title: Alfa-Bank to Launch Bitcoin and Crypto Services in Russia
summary: Russia's largest private bank, Alfa-Bank, plans to offer Bitcoin and crypto trading, custody, and a digital depository once new regulations are in place. This move is part of a broader trend among major Russian banks entering the crypto market by late 2026 or 2027.
body:
Alfa-Bank, Russia's largest private lender, has announced plans to launch Bitcoin and crypto trading services. The bank will also offer custody and a digital depository once new regulations take effect, joining other major Russian banks in the emerging crypto market.

The move is part of a broader push by Russian financial institutions to enter the crypto space by late 2026 or 2027. Alfa-Bank's initiative includes trading, secure storage, and digital asset management, making it more accessible for everyday users and investors.

This development is significant for Russian citizens who have limited access to crypto services through traditional banking channels. It could democratize crypto investments and provide a regulated, secure platform for trading and storage.

Alfa-Bank's entry into the crypto market is expected to set a precedent for other major banks in Russia. The timeline for these services to go live depends on the finalization of new crypto regulations, which are anticipated by late 2026 or 2027. Users should watch for official announcements regarding the launch dates and regulatory approvals.
